context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 verified: 1) Backend models.py refactored into models/ package with 4 files (auth.py, business.py, appointments.py, loyalty.py) + __init__.py for re-exports. All imports work via 'from models import ModelName'. 2) Drag-and-drop section reorder replaces arrow buttons in /gestione-sito page 'Ordine Sezioni' tab. Each section has data-testid='section-item-{key}' and draggable='true'. Reset button data-testid='reset-section-order'. Save persists order via PUT /api/website/config.
